title: Wealthon
description: A custom coin mod with emphasis on roleplay!
body:
A basic coin mod with no other current uses. On it's own it adds 3 coin types;

Bronze
Silver
Gold

and it also adds a "purse" item, which allows players to store coins inside of. These purses store the coins inside them. Currently there is no conversion between coin types, but in the future in other mods I create, there will be ways to convert from bronze, to silver, to gold and vise versa.


If you have any questions or need to report a bug, please hop onto the Byte & Scrolls discord and let us know!
